entries.mnemonic: n+our(我们的)+ish(使)→我们"养育"自己的子女

senses.def_en: to provide with food or other substances necessary for growth
senses.example: They needed good food to nourish their bodies.
senses.example_zh: 他们需要好食品滋养身体。

senses.def_en: to keep a feeling or belief in one's mind
senses.example: No matter how bad things are, we should always nourish a hope in our mind.
senses.example_zh: 无论事情多么糟糕，我们心里都要满怀希望。

derivatives: nourishment n. 滋养品;滋养状况

senses.example: He is so tame that he agrees with everybody.
senses.example_zh: 他很随和，总是顺从他人的意见。

senses.example: The film has a tame ending.
senses.example_zh: 那部电影的结局枯燥无味。

senses.example: One day man will tame nature. // Pigeons are easy to tame.
senses.example_zh: 总有一天人类会征服大自然。鸽子很容易驯养。

senses.example: Every citizen is supposed to have civil rights and civil duties.
senses.example_zh: 每一个公民都有权利和义务。

senses.example: civil construction
senses.example_zh: 民用建筑

senses.example: Many civil cases can be settled out of court.
senses.example_zh: 许多民事案件可以在法庭外解决。

senses.example: Try at least to be civil.
senses.example_zh: 至少要尽量礼貌些。

senses.example: The bomb injured 12 civilians.
senses.example_zh: 炸弹炸伤了12名平民。

senses.example: civilian demands // civilian industry
senses.example_zh: 百姓的要求；民用工业

senses.def_en: to bring out of a primitive state
senses.example: The African countries hoped to civilize all the primitive tribes on the land.
senses.example_zh: 非洲国家希望把非洲所有的原始部落都变成文明社会。

entries.mnemonic: sacri(神圣的)+fice(使)→古人认为"献祭"使万物变得圣洁

senses.example: Success in your job is not worth the sacrifice of your health.
senses.example_zh: 以牺牲健康来求得工作上的成功是不值得的。

senses.example: They made sacrifices to the gods to ensure a good harvest.
senses.example_zh: 为了保丰收，他们向神灵献祭。

senses.example: She sacrificed much of her spare time to help the orphanage.
senses.example_zh: 她牺牲了很多闲暇时间帮助孤儿院做事。

senses.example: The ancient Greeks sacrificed lambs or calves before engaging in battle.
senses.example_zh: 古希腊人参战前都要献祭羔羊或牛犊。

senses.example: Many childless couples adopted children.
senses.example_zh: 许多无子女的夫妇收养了孩子。

senses.def_en: to take and use as one's own
senses.example: Circumstances will force us finally to adopt this policy.
senses.example_zh: 情况最终会迫使我们采用这项政策。

senses.example: adopt a resolution unanimously
senses.example_zh: 全体一致通过决议

derivatives: adoption n. 收养,领养;采用

senses.def_en: to change your behavior so that it is easier to live in a particular place or situation
senses.example: She adapted herself quickly to the new climate.
senses.example_zh: 她很快就适应了这种新气候。

senses.def_en: to make suitable to or fit for a specific use or situation
senses.example: This machine has been specially adapted for underwater use.
senses.example_zh: 这机器是为在水下使用而特别改装的。
